source.title: Our World in Data — Rice Yields
source.note: Rice — yield_kg_ha: Global average paddy rice yield of 4,700 kg/ha based on FAO data.

source.title: Mekonnen & Hoekstra — Water Footprint of Crops (Report 47)
source.note: Rice — water_per_kg: Report 47 Table A1 gives 1,673 L/kg for paddy rice. Dataset uses 2,500 L/kg which reflects milled white rice basis: 1,673 ÷ 0.65 milling yield ≈ 2,574 L/kg. This is consistent with Chapagain & Hoekstra (2011) who report 2,291–2,500 L/kg for white rice. The 2,500 value is accepted as correct for the milled-rice basis used throughout the dataset.
